ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "number_of_genes" INTEGER /* Number of genes associated with the disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the disease (e.g., Ear, nose, and throat, Brain and nervous system) */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the disease */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the disease was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the disease information was updated */,
  "published_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the disease information has been published (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diseases_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene associated with the disease */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease associated with the gene */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of association */,
  "score_hpo" INTEGER /* Score based on HPO terms */,
  "score_conf" REAL /* Confidence score of the association */,
  "score_total" REAL /* Total score aggregating various metrics */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene */,
  "gene_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome (e.g., chr1:1234567-1234789) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the gene was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the gene information was updated */,
  "published_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the gene information has been published (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene ID */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., score_hpo, score_conf, score_total) */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the score was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the score information was updated */,
  "published_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the score information has been published (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active (e.g., true, false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
